title: Classic Pancakes
description: Fluffy, golden pancakes that are perfect for a lazy morning.
steps: Mix flour, sugar, baking powder, and salt in a large bowl.
In another bowl, whisk together milk, egg, and melted butter.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry and stir until just combined (lumps are okay!).
Heat a pan over medium heat and lightly grease it.
Pour about ¼ cup of batter per pancake. Cook until bubbles form, then flip.
Serve warm with maple syrup and enjoy!

title: Spaghetti Aglio e Olio
description: A simple yet elegant Italian pasta with garlic and olive oil.
steps: Cook spaghetti in salted boiling water until al dente.
While pasta cooks, thinly slice the garlic cloves.
Heat olive oil in a large pan over medium-low heat.
Add garlic and chili flakes. Cook until garlic is golden (don't burn it!).
Reserve 1 cup of pasta water, then drain the pasta.
Add pasta to the pan with garlic oil, splash in some pasta water, toss well.
Season, top with parsley and Parmesan, serve immediately.

title: Avocado Toast
description: The ultimate quick breakfast — creamy, crunchy, and satisfying.
steps: Toast your bread to golden perfection.
Halve the avocado, remove the pit, and scoop the flesh into a bowl.
Mash with a fork, add lemon juice, salt, and pepper.
Spread the mashed avocado generously on the toast.
Optional: top with a fried or poached egg.
Sprinkle red pepper flakes and everything bagel seasoning. Serve!

title: Chicken Stir Fry
description: A quick, colorful stir fry packed with veggies and savory sauce.
steps: Slice chicken into thin strips and toss with a pinch of cornstarch.
Mix soy sauce, sesame oil, garlic, and ginger in a small bowl.
Heat oil in a wok or large pan over high heat.
Cook chicken until browned, about 5-6 minutes. Set aside.
Add vegetables and stir fry for 3-4 minutes until tender-crisp.
Return chicken to the pan, pour over the sauce, toss everything together.
Serve hot over rice.

title: Chocolate Mug Cake
description: A rich, fudgy cake made in a mug in under 5 minutes.
steps: Add flour, sugar, cocoa powder, and salt to a large mug. Mix well.
Add the egg and stir it in.
Pour in the milk, oil, and vanilla. Mix until smooth.
Microwave on high for 60-90 seconds.
The cake is done when it pulls away from the sides. Don't overcook!
Let cool for 1 minute, then enjoy straight from the mug.

title: Caesar Salad
description: Crispy romaine, tangy dressing, and crunchy croutons.
steps: Wash and dry the romaine lettuce, then chop into bite-sized pieces.
Place lettuce in a large bowl.
Drizzle Caesar dressing over the lettuce and toss to coat evenly.
Add croutons and grated Parmesan.
Squeeze a little lemon juice over the top.
Season with black pepper and serve immediately.

title: Berry Smoothie Bowl
description: A vibrant, refreshing bowl of blended fruits topped with crunchy goodness.
steps: Place frozen berries, banana, and almond milk into a blender.
Blend on high until completely smooth and thick.
Pour the mixture into a shallow bowl.
Top with a handful of granola and fresh blueberries.
Sprinkle with chia seeds and drizzle honey over the top.
Enjoy immediately before it melts!

title: Margherita Pizza
description: The classic Italian pizza with fresh basil, mozzarella, and tomato sauce.
steps: Preheat your oven to its highest setting (usually 250°C/500°F).
On a floured surface, stretch the dough into a 12-inch circle.
Spread a thin layer of tomato sauce over the dough.
Tear the mozzarella into chunks and distribute evenly.
Bake for 8-10 minutes until the crust is golden and cheese is bubbly.
Remove from oven, top with fresh basil and a drizzle of olive oil.

title: Quinoa Buddha Bowl
description: A nutritious and colorful bowl packed with protein and fresh veggies.
steps: Roast sweet potato cubes with olive oil at 200°C for 20 minutes.
Place a base of spinach in a large bowl.
Add the cooked quinoa, chickpeas, cucumber, and roasted sweet potatoes.
Drizzle generously with tahini dressing.
Squeeze fresh lemon juice over the top.
Toss lightly and serve warm or cold.

title: Classic Beef Burger
description: A juicy, homemade beef patty served in a toasted brioche bun.
steps: Shape the beef into a flat patty, slightly wider than the bun.
Season both sides generously with salt and pepper.
Grill or pan-fry over high heat for 3-4 minutes per side.
Place cheese on the patty in the last minute of cooking to melt.
Toast the bun halves until lightly browned.
Assemble with sauce, lettuce, tomato, and the juicy patty.
